children.heading: Coordination within Department of Justice
children.label: a Coordination within Department of Justice
children.text: The Attorney General shall assign an officer of the Department of Justice to act as the national coordinator of the AMBER Alert communications network regarding abducted children. The officer so designated shall be known as the AMBER Alert Coordinator of the Department of Justice.

seek to eliminate gaps in the network, including gaps in areas of interstate travel (including airports, maritime ports, border crossing areas and checkpoints, and ports of exit from the United States);
work with States, territories of the United States, and tribal governments to encourage the development of additional elements (known as local AMBER plans) in the network;
work with States, territories of the United States, and tribal governments to ensure appropriate regional coordination of various elements of the network; and

children.label: A
children.text: the development of the network; and

children.label: B
children.text: regional coordination of alerts on abducted children through the network.

children.heading: Consultation with Federal Bureau of Investigation
children.label: c Consultation with Federal Bureau of Investigation
children.text: In carrying out duties under subsection (b), the Coordinator shall notify and consult with the Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation concerning each child abduction for which an alert is issued through the AMBER Alert communications network.

children.heading: Cooperation
children.label: d Cooperation
children.text: The Coordinator shall cooperate with the Secretary of Transportation, the Secretary of Homeland Security, and the Federal Communications Commission in carrying out activities under this section.

children.heading: Report
children.label: e Report
children.text: Not later than , the Coordinator shall submit to Congress a report on the activities of the Coordinator and the effectiveness and status of the AMBER plans of each State that has implemented such a plan. The Coordinator shall prepare the report in consultation with the Secretary of Transportation.March 1, 2005
